stories.title: Anicia Berton, militante martiniquaise, est décédée
stories.summary: Anicia Berton, militante martiniquaise, est décédée à l'âge de 50 ans après une longue bataille contre le cancer. Originaire de Sainte-Anne, elle présidait l'association "Nasyon Matinik" et défendait les causes de l'exposition aux pesticides, les réparations liées à l'esclavage et la justice sociale et environnementale. Ses proches et amis lui rendent hommage sur les réseaux sociaux après son décès. Anicia Berton avait choisi de poursuivre son engagement malgré la maladie.

stories.title: Hommage à Jean‑Marc Sylvestre : la liberté, le journalisme et la vie en combat
stories.summary: Jean-Marc Sylvestre, un journaliste économique français, est décédé à 79 ans après une longue maladie. Il était connu pour sa voix familière dans le journalisme économique français et écrivait pour le site Atlantico depuis près de 15 ans. Il a travaillé à la télévision, notamment sur TF1 et LCI, pendant plus de 18 ans. Sa disparition laisse un vide dans le monde du journalisme économique français.

stories.title: EastEnders airs horrific Joel Marshall attack twist in early iPlayer release
stories.summary: EastEnders has aired a shocking twist in the storyline of Joel Marshall, as he faces a brutal revenge attack from a group of Albert Square teens. The teens, led by Avani and Amy, invited Joel to their end-of-term party under false pretenses, intending to deliver a message that he's not welcome in the Square. The attack has left Joel's fate in peril. The incident follows concerns from Joel's father Ross and stepmother Vicki about his presence in Walford.

stories.title: ‘Terrifying’: Woman says landlord was hiding behind wall of Wexford holiday home
stories.summary: A woman and her family were left "terrified" after discovering a landlord hiding behind a wall in a Co Wexford holiday home they had booked through Booking.com. The incident occurred last weekend when Therese and her family returned from a family party to find the landlord behind the wall. Booking.com has launched an investigation into the incident and suspended the property while it is completed. The company is reviewing its policies to ensure such incidents do not happen in the future.

stories.title: Casemiro: Inter Miami being investigated for tampering after signing ex-Manchester United midfielder
stories.summary: Major League Soccer is investigating Inter Miami for alleged tampering after the club signed Brazilian midfielder Casemiro on a deal through 2027 with an option to extend until 2029. The investigation concerns Casemiro's discovery rights, which Inter Miami acquired from the Los Angeles Galaxy. Casemiro left Manchester United at the end of last season. The league will gather all relevant information before making further comment.

stories.title: Polymarket Promo Code "LIVESCORE" Claim $50 Trade Bonus on Orioles at Red Sox
stories.summary: A $50 trade bonus is available to new users on Polymarket, a prediction market platform, when they sign up using the promo code LIVESCORE. This offer is available for users in the US, who must be at least 18 years old, and is valid for the MLB season. The bonus is a strong starting point to explore Polymarket's features, which allow users to trade on real-world outcomes. The offer is available for a limited time, as users can start trading on baseball and other markets immediately.

stories.title: IFC: First Look at The Stunt Driver
stories.summary: Jay Baruchel stars as Ken Carter, a Canadian daredevil stunt driver, in the upcoming comedy film The Stunt Driver, set to open in U.S. theaters on September 25. The movie tells the true underdog story of Carter's attempt to jump a mile across the St. Lawrence river in a rocket car. Ben Foster plays Evel Knievel in the film, which also features Laurence Leboeuf, Dan Bakkedahl, and Ed Helms. The Stunt Driver is a biopic about Carter's life and death, which was marked by a tragic accident in 1983.

stories.title: Las Feministas del PSOE y 96 asociaciones de España y Latinoamérica cargan contra Bibiana Aído ante ONU por atacar a la relatora de Mujer
stories.summary: Bibiana Aído, director regional de ONU Mujeres para América Latina y el Caribe, is facing criticism from over 96 organizations in Spain and Latin America, including the Spanish Socialist Workers' Party's feminist wing, for allegedly defaming and attacking Reem Alsalem, a UN special rapporteur on violence against women. The organizations accuse Aído of promoting a report that dilutes the distinction between sex and gender, normalizes prostitution, and supports gestation by a third party. Aído is expected to respond to the allegations.

stories.title: Courbatures, nausées, vomissements aux Vieilles charrues : des festivaliers malades, la piste des déshydratations en série privilégiée
stories.summary: At least 34 festival-goers fell ill during the 34th edition of the Vieilles Charrues festival in France, with symptoms including cramps, vomiting, and dehydration. The festival's organizers believe the cause is likely severe dehydration, not food poisoning. The incident occurred on July 18, 2026, and the festival is still open. The situation is being closely monitored by medical staff on site.

stories.title: Isabel Rose: British woman jailed for blackmail after accusing banker of rape in Hong Kong
stories.summary: A British woman was jailed for six years in Hong Kong on Wednesday after a court found her rape allegation against a banker was fabricated. Isabel Rose, 26, from London, made the false claim in January 2024 while visiting the man, who was arrested but later released without charge. Prosecutors said she sought £100,000 in exchange for dropping the accusation. Rose denied the charges and maintains she was raped, with her legal team reviewing further options.

stories.title: Polymarket Promo Code SBWIRE Get $20 Bonus for UFC, PGA, Politics & More (July 22)
stories.summary: New users can now access Polymarket's prediction markets with a $20 bonus after a $10 deposit using the promo code SBWIRE. The offer is available to eligible users in 48 states and DC, excluding Nevada and Minnesota. The bonus can be used on various markets, including sports, politics, and more. With the NFL preseason opener on August 6, users can jump in on the action and start trading live markets today.

stories.title: Obama Takes Shot at Vance Over Marriage ‘Hypocrisy’
stories.summary: Former President Barack Obama criticized Vice President JD Vance for his stance on immigration, pointing out the hypocrisy of Vance's hardline rhetoric given his own marriage to an immigrant. Vance's wife, Usha, received US citizenship at birth after her parents immigrated from India. Obama made the comments on a podcast, suggesting Vance feels guilty about his marriage contradicting his views. The exchange highlights the contrast between the two men's views on American identity.

stories.title: Man, 30s, dies after being struck by van in Co Kilkenny
stories.summary: A man in his 30s has died after being struck by a van on the R693 near Arigan Bridge in Co Kilkenny at 9:30am. This is the 101st road fatality in Ireland so far this year. The man, a pedestrian, was pronounced dead at the scene and his body was taken to University Hospital Waterford for a post-mortem examination. Gardaí are appealing for witnesses to come forward with any information or camera footage.

stories.title: Ryanair Spain flight suffers 'technical issue' and met by emergency services
stories.summary: A Ryanair flight from Malaga to Edinburgh, FR5090, declared a mid-air emergency and issued a 7700 squawk code before landing safely at Edinburgh Airport on July 22. The crew reported a minor technical issue, which was inspected by engineers as standard procedure. Passengers disembarked normally. An investigation into the incident is likely to follow.

stories.title: Coritiba x Palmeiras: onde assistir ao vivo, horário e escalações
stories.summary: Coritiba and Palmeiras are set to face off in the Brasileirão at the Couto Pereira stadium on July 22, with Palmeiras holding a 15-point lead over Coritiba in the standings. Palmeiras has 41 points in 18 games, while Coritiba has 26 points in 18 games. The match is scheduled to start at 7:30 PM local time, and will be broadcast live on Amazon Prime. Palmeiras will be without coach Abel Ferreira, who is serving a suspension.

stories.title: Barcelona market value update: Lamine remains at the top at €220m; Cubarsi breaks €100m barrier
stories.summary: Barcelona's Lamine Yamal remains the world's most valuable footballer, tied with Erling Haaland, with a market value of €220 million following Spain's successful 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign. Pau Cubarsi, a 19-year-old Barcelona defender, has broken the €100 million barrier, reaching a valuation of €100 million after being named the tournament's Best Young Player. This update comes from Transfermarkt. The market values of several Barcelona players have increased after impressive World Cup performances.

stories.title: Mid-air mass brawl halts easyJet's Tenerife to Liverpool flight
stories.summary: A mid-air brawl involving around 10 passengers on easyJet flight EZY3352 forced the plane to return to Tenerife South airport on Tuesday evening, posing a safety risk to the 186 passengers on board. The captain made the decision to turn back about 30 minutes after departure. Police met the plane upon its return and the flight later continued to Liverpool. The airline is investigating the incident.

stories.title: "Bad Times at the El Royale" bei Pro7 im Livestream und TV: TV-Tipp bei Pro7 - Film von Drew Goddard am 23.07.2026
stories.summary: The film "Bad Times at the El Royale" by Drew Goddard will be shown on Pro7 on July 23, 2026, at 00:10 UTC, with a 155-minute runtime. The movie, a mystery thriller released in 2018, follows the intersecting paths of seven mysterious individuals at the down-at-heel Hotel El Royale. Pro7 will also offer a live stream of the film online.
stories.trend: bad times at the el royale

stories.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
stories.summary: Tesla reported weaker-than-expected earnings for the second quarter, with adjusted earnings per share of 33 cents, missing the 51 cents expected by analysts. Revenue topped estimates at $28.24 billion, a 26% increase from the same period last year. The company's net income fell 5% to $1.11 billion. Tesla's stock price slid about 4% in extended trading, continuing a decline that has seen the stock drop 17% this year.

stories.title: Shownieuws creëert verwarring over lot Greetje in Urk!: 'Doet echt niet meer mee'
stories.summary: Reality TV star Greetje Hakvoort's participation in the show Urk is in question, with conflicting statements from the show's presenters. Shownieuws host Fien Vermeulen claims Greetje will no longer appear in the series, while earlier in the show, host Teun Kapitein said she is still part of the cast. The show's producers have stated that Greetje's departure is not confirmed. The situation remains unclear, with Greetje's future in the show uncertain.

stories.title: Arokodare forces Wolves training to be cancelled
stories.summary: Wolverhampton Wanderers cancelled a training session after striker Tolu Arokodare refused to leave the pitch, demanding a transfer to Fiorentina despite the club rejecting a bid from the Serie A side. Arokodare, 25, was not involved in Wednesday's friendly at Maidenhead United. The latest incident is the second flashpoint in the forward's career at Molineux, following a disciplinary action in April. The club's new head coach, Cesar Peixoto, terminated the training session on Monday.

stories.title: Juve-Vlahovic: prove di rinnovo, ma c'è molta distanza. E Carnevali non molla Kolo Muani
stories.summary: Juventus and Dusan Vlahovic have begun negotiations on a contract renewal, with the club offering a maximum of 6 million euros in salary and commissions, while Vlahovic is seeking 7 million euros annually and 9 million euros for signing. The two parties are still far apart, but this gap may serve as a starting point for a compromise. The club is also pursuing Kolo Muani, but Paris Saint-Germain has already rejected three offers from Juventus, valuing the player at 50 million euros.

stories.title: Has Trump dragged the US into a forever war in Iran? | Mohamad Bazzi
stories.summary: A US-Iran ceasefire negotiated by President Trump has collapsed, marking nearly five months since the start of a war in Iran. The conflict has continued despite Trump's initial promise of a decisive victory within weeks. The US is now at risk of being drawn into a prolonged conflict, contradicting Trump's 2024 election pledge to stop wars. The situation remains uncertain as the US and Iran re-evaluate their next steps.

stories.title: Indian police cracked down on 'cockroach' protesters. They went home and made memes about it
stories.summary: On Monday, tens of thousands of protesters from the youth-led Cockroach Janta Party marched toward India’s parliament in Delhi, demanding Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan’s resignation over exam leaks and recruitment scandals. Police responded with tear gas and baton charges, but protesters dispersed and later mocked the crackdown online with memes. Pradhan has refused to step down, blaming opposition parties for politicizing the issue. The movement, which began over exam irregularities, has expanded into broader calls for government accountability.

stories.title: July 23, 2026: Alcala Gurri vs Dietrich Tennis Prediction Market
stories.summary: Professional tennis player M. Alcala Gurri is favored to win the July 23, 2026, match against D. Dietrich, with odds of 47 cents to Dietrich's 55 cents. The match is part of the 2026 ATP Challenger Zug Round Of 16. Gurri's chances of winning have been bet on by 141 people, while 992 have bet on Dietrich. The outcome of the match will determine the resolution of the prediction market contract.

stories.title: Not Greek to them. Scholars question Christopher Nolan’s ‘The Odyssey’
stories.summary: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" has grossed over $260 million worldwide in its opening weekend, but scholars like Greek translator Emily Wilson question the film's ability to capture the essence of Homer's epic poem. Wilson's own translation of "The Odyssey" has seen a surge in popularity, reaching the top 5 on Amazon.com. Critics have praised the film's acting and narrative drive. The movie's success has brought renewed attention to the ancient poem.

stories.title: Zecken breiten sich im Nordwesten aus – so schützen Sie sich
stories.summary: Zecken infestation is spreading in the northwest of Germany, particularly in Niedersachsen, where cases of tick-borne Frühsommer-Meningoenzephalitis, or FSME, have been increasing. According to health officials, the virus can now be found in ticks across all of Germany, with new risk areas identified in Nordrhein-Westfalen and Sachsen-Anhalt. In Niedersachsen, the Ems region is particularly at risk, with tick encounters common in everyday life, not just during outdoor activities. Health authorities are urging residents to take precautions to protect themselves.

stories.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
stories.summary: Google parent Alphabet reported negative free cash flow of $5.9 billion in its latest quarter, the first time in over a decade, as AI infrastructure costs surged to $45 billion. Revenue grew 23% year-over-year to $119.8 billion, but stock fell 4% after hours. AI spending is projected to reach $205 billion this year, with 60% of costs covering servers and 40% for data centers. Analysts expect continued heavy investment as the AI race intensifies.

stories.title: How Troy Jackson went from an anti-abortion Republican to the Democrats’ hope for defeating Susan Collins
stories.summary: Troy Jackson is poised to become the Democratic nominee for Senate in Maine, potentially challenging Susan Collins. Jackson, a former Maine Senate Democratic leader with over two decades of state politics experience, has gained support from former Graham Platner supporters. He now faces a primary election. Jackson's campaign is seen as a more stable alternative after Platner's campaign imploded amid a rape allegation.

stories.title: Conservatives Parrot A Victimhood Script Written By Barack Obama
stories.summary: Former US President Donald Trump won the 2024 presidential election, despite concerns that social media platforms like TikTok may be fueling opposition to the war in Iran. According to reports, Trump's campaign benefited from the platform, which has been criticized for promoting socialism. The election took place on a specific date, but that information is not available in the provided excerpts. The outcome of the election has significant implications for US foreign policy and domestic politics.

stories.title: Alphabet earnings updates: Stock sinks during analyst call as company hikes 2026 capex
stories.summary: Google's stock sank during an analyst call as the company increased its 2026 capital expenditure forecast to as much as $205 billion. Alphabet's CEO Sundar Pichai emphasized scaling the business and executing on its potential, particularly with its Waymo autonomous taxi service. The company is also investing heavily in its Gemini 4 AI model, with plans to release new models almost every month. Google's increased spending is expected to fuel growth in its various sectors.

stories.title: Shaken, Soaked and Seasick: What It’s Like to Survive ‘The Odyssey’ in 4DX
stories.summary: Christopher Nolan’s three-hour epic The Odyssey, starring Matt Damon, now offers a 4DX experience with seat rumbling and water effects. The immersive format premiered in select theaters on October 11, adding physical motion to the film’s visual spectacle. Audiences report a heightened sensory experience compared to standard screenings. The 4DX rollout expands Nolan’s film’s accessibility beyond traditional IMAX and 70mm formats.

stories.title: Tears and sleepless nights as Marshall and Adlington get Scotland flag honour
stories.summary: Scotland will honour Commonwealth Games flagbearers Marshall and Adlington ahead of Thursday’s opening ceremony. Marshall, 59, a bowls competitor from East Lothian, will carry the flag alongside his niece Beth Riva, while judoka Adlington, 39, aims to complete a career treble. Both learned of the honour weeks ago but kept it secret until now. The pair will share the flag during the parade before it returns for the competition start.

stories.title: Die Exporte nach Singapur verzeichnen weiterhin ein starkes Wachstum.
stories.summary: Vietnam’s exports to Singapore surged 48.9 percent in June 2026, reaching 85.4 billion SGD as bilateral trade hit 27.9 billion SGD, up 43.1 percent year-on-year. Singapore’s total trade volume with the world jumped 49.3 percent to 158.1 billion SGD in June alone. For the first half of 2026, Singapore’s trade totaled 887 billion SGD, a 33 percent increase over the same period in 2025. Vietnam remains Singapore’s 10th largest trading partner.

stories.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
stories.summary: Liverpool are closing in on a deal for Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, 23, after his standout World Cup performances for France. The Reds lead the race over Arsenal and Bayern Munich for the winger, who has four goal contributions this summer. Meanwhile, Manchester United’s Bruno Fernandes, 31, has agreed to extend his stay. Arsenal are also weighing options for captain Martin Odegaard, 27.

stories.title: Joshua not ready for death of friends to 'sink in'
stories.summary: Anthony Joshua says he’s still not ready to process the deaths of two close friends and team members in a December 29 crash near Lagos. The boxer, who suffered minor injuries, returns to the ring Saturday against Kristian Prenga in his first fight since knocking out Jake Paul. Joshua called the loss “tough,” telling BBC Sport the pain lingers even when talking about it. The bout marks his first competitive match since the fatal accident.

stories.title: Trump threatens to target Iran's bridges and power plants if Hormuz attacks persist
stories.summary: President Donald Trump threatened to strike Iranian bridges or power plants, including near Tehran, if attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz continue. The warning follows 11 consecutive US strikes on Iran, with explosions reported in multiple cities, including near the Bushehr nuclear plant. Iran has vowed reprisals after Trump said the US would target an underground nuclear site near Natanz. Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan reported intercepting Iranian drones in recent days.

stories.title: ‘Doctor Strange’ Director Says Elon Musk ‘Doesn’t Know S— About Cinema’ After Musk Vows to Make AI ‘Odyssey’: ‘His Opinions on Art Are Worthless’
stories.summary: Film director Scott Derrickson criticized Elon Musk on July 22, 2026, calling his views on cinema worthless after Musk claimed his AI tool Grok would produce a full-length movie of The Odyssey by year’s end. Musk shared an AI-generated clip from the project, but Derrickson dismissed his filmmaking knowledge, saying Musk stopped reading in his 20s. Musk has previously attacked Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey over casting choices. Industry observers now await the AI-generated film’s release.

stories.title: ‘Star Trek: Strange New Worlds’ Cast, Co-Showrunner Talk Playing With Genres in Season 4, ‘Joyful Curiosity,’ and That Puppet Episode
stories.summary: Season 4 of Star Trek: Strange New Worlds will explore multiple genres, blending classic sci-fi thrills with fresh storytelling approaches. Cast members Anson Mount, Celia Rose Gooding, Melissa Navia, and Carol Kane joined co-showrunner Akiva Goldsman at 92NY in New York to preview the Paramount+ series’ upcoming season. Goldsman highlighted episodes that push boundaries, following the show’s trend of genre experimentation. The season premieres after a sneak peek at the new episodes.

stories.title: Hart van Nederland nu kijken of gemist?
stories.summary: A Dutch news program, Hart van Nederland, airs on SBS 6 at 01:55 on July 25, covering the latest news from the Netherlands and abroad. The program provides a unique perspective on the day's top stories in 10 minutes. Viewers can also catch up on previous episodes on the SBS 6 website.

stories.title: A year after deadly jet crash at Bangladesh school, families demand answers
stories.summary: A year after a Bangladeshi air force jet crashed into Milestone School and College in Dhaka, killing 36 people—mostly children—families and survivors marked the anniversary demanding answers. More than 160 were injured in the deadliest aviation disaster in decades. Survivors like sixth-grader Nure Jannat Yusha describe ongoing trauma, with many unable to return to normal life. Investigations into the cause continue as the school community gathers to remember the victims.

stories.title: Meta won’t have to face the next planned social media addiction trial
stories.summary: A Florida teen dropped a lawsuit against Meta just days before trial, withdrawing claims that the company’s features harmed teens. The case, part of a broader set of bellwether trials, was set to test whether social media platforms designed addictive features. TikTok, Snap, and YouTube previously settled similar claims by the same plaintiff for undisclosed amounts. Meta avoided trial and will continue defending against similar lawsuits.

stories.title: Blocked by censors, China's animal lovers take fight against abuse offline and overseas
stories.summary: Animal welfare activists in China are taking their fight against animal cruelty overseas after graphic videos of a stray dog and her puppies being killed sparked outrage in June. Authorities cited the four boys involved, all under 14, as they urged online silence and removed posts, but the restrictions fueled further protests. Supporters have now placed billboards in New York to rally international attention. Three weeks later, social media posts about the incident continue to draw thousands of comments in China.

stories.title: Diamante: il secondo falò - Temptation Island Clip | Witty TV
stories.summary: A fire broke out at the Diamante nightclub in Italy, causing significant damage. The incident occurred on June 23, 2026, during a live event. The cause of the fire is not specified, but it is reported to have been extinguished. The nightclub was hosting a live event at the time of the fire, and the extent of the damage is not yet clear.

stories.title: World Cup 2026: Gavi does not think Paredes should be suspended
stories.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi believes Argentina's Leandro Paredes should not be suspended for his role in a confrontation following the World Cup final. Paredes was involved in a physical altercation with Spain's Eric Garcia, but Gavi thinks a match ejection would have been sufficient. The incident is under review by FIFA, which may impose suspensions or fines on players and coaches involved. A disciplinary and ethics prosecutor has been appointed to assess the situation.

stories.title: talkSPORT tips – Best football bets and expert advice for Wednesday 22 July
stories.summary: Major League Soccer resumes after a two-month break with a packed schedule on Wednesday, featuring eight matches, including New England Revolution hosting Toronto, where the Canadians are winless in nine matches. The Revolution have kept three clean sheets at home this season. New England is expected to come out on top against Toronto. The outcome will be a crucial test for Toronto's struggling team.

stories.title: Vincenzo Italiano: "Çok kaliteli bir oyuncu, beni şaşırttı"
stories.summary: Beşiktaş Teknik Direktörü Vincenzo Italiano, UEFA Avrupa Ligi'nde Midtjylland ile oynayacakları karşılaşma öncesinde takımın hazır olduğunu belirterek, sahaya Beşiktaş kimliğini yansıtan bir ekip çıkarmayı hedeflediklerini söyledi. Italiano, sezon öncesi kampının milli takımlarda bulunan oyuncular nedeniyle eksik kadroyla başladığını ifade etti. Beşiktaş, Midtjylland ile oynayacakları maçta tam kadro ile çıkacak. Italiano, Avrupa kupalarının farklı bir heyecan taşıdığını ve takımın yolumuza devam etmek istediklerini belirtti.

stories.title: Student Police Academy helps inspire the next generation
stories.summary: Twenty-four students from local schools graduated from the 2026 Delta Police Student Police Academy, marking the conclusion of another successful year. The Academy provided students with hands-on experience in policing, including the Police Officer Physical Abilities Test and high ropes course. Students learned about the various aspects of modern policing, such as investigations and community engagement. The graduates now have a better understanding of the career and its demands, potentially inspiring the next generation of police officers.

stories.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
stories.summary: The US and Saudi Arabia signed a landmark nuclear deal on Wednesday, allowing Saudi Arabia to enrich uranium on its soil at a US-built facility. The agreement aims to enhance regional security and strengthen US leadership in civil nuclear technology. US Energy Secretary Chris Wright emphasized the deal’s adherence to high nuclear safety and nonproliferation standards. Experts will monitor compliance to prevent weapons-grade uranium production.

stories.title: Ao vivo: Coritiba x Palmeiras | Rodada 19 | Campeonato Brasileiro
stories.summary: Palmeiras defeated Coritiba 2-0 in the 19th round of the Campeonato Brasileiro. The match took place on a specific date, with Palmeiras scoring two goals. Coritiba was unable to score, resulting in a shutout. Palmeiras' win moves them forward in the standings.

stories.title: Trump’s Plan for Science: More Money for A.I., Less for Universities
stories.summary: Michael Kratsios, President Trump’s science adviser, proposed overhauling how the government funds research. Democrats said Mr. Trump’s actions had weakened science.

stories.title: Why Are Young People in India Protesting?
stories.summary: A youth-led movement angry over the education system and a lack of jobs is posing a rare challenge to a government that has ruled for more than a decade with a firm hand.

stories.title: Alphabet Quadruples Profit to $112 Billion, Fueled by A.I. Investments
stories.summary: Google’s parent company, which has spent heavily on artificial intelligence, also showed growth across its businesses, particularly in cloud computing.

stories.title: House Passes Defense Bill Amid Iran War Divide
stories.summary: Republicans pushed through the $1.15 trillion bill over opposition from Democrats, who said backing it was akin to embracing the war.

stories.title: Three Airports Plan to Ditch T.S.A. Amid Push for Private Security
stories.summary: The airports have opted in to the agency’s new security model, an agency spokesperson confirmed on Wednesday. A union official said the move could jeopardize public safety.

stories.title: NASA to Showcase Agency’s Newest Wind Tunnel in Virginia
stories.summary: NASA will unveil its first new wind tunnel in over 40 years at Langley Research Center in Hampton, Virginia, on July 31. The Flight Dynamics Research Facility will be showcased during a ribbon-cutting ceremony and media tour featuring NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman and other officials. The event is open only to U.S. media citizens or permanent residents, who must RSVP by July 29. This marks a key step in NASA’s ongoing aerospace research capabilities.

stories.title: What Were the Lotus-Eaters Eating in Homer’s ‘Odyssey’?
stories.summary: In Homer’s epic, Odysseus’s men eat something so powerful that they forget about home. Which plants could have produced such a soporific, narcotic and amnesiac effect?

stories.title: Donald Trump Jr.’s Investment Firm Posts Staggering Returns of 200%
stories.summary: The fledgling firm, run by the president’s oldest son and his partner Omeed Malik, has made investments in A.I. and defense technology that have tripled in value in just months.

stories.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
stories.summary: A British health select committee report finds that obesity is an engineered outcome, not a failure of willpower. The report targets ultra-processed foods, citing sugar and refined carbohydrates as primary drivers of weight gain and type 2 diabetes. The committee recommends a new approach to food policy, shifting focus from the "high in fat, salt or sugar" framework to a more targeted strategy. This change aims to hold supermarkets and manufacturers accountable for healthier food options.

stories.title: Government Overhauls Teen Pregnancy Program to Focus on Marriage and Starting Families
stories.summary: The administration canceled federal grants to organizations across the country, accusing them of encouraging premarital sex. New criteria say programs should stress abstinence.

offbeat.title: Anicia Berton, militante martiniquaise, est décédée
offbeat.summary: Anicia Berton, militante martiniquaise, est décédée à l'âge de 50 ans après une longue bataille contre le cancer. Originaire de Sainte-Anne, elle présidait l'association "Nasyon Matinik" et défendait les causes de l'exposition aux pesticides, les réparations liées à l'esclavage et la justice sociale et environnementale. Ses proches et amis lui rendent hommage sur les réseaux sociaux après son décès. Anicia Berton avait choisi de poursuivre son engagement malgré la maladie.

offbeat.title: Hommage à Jean‑Marc Sylvestre : la liberté, le journalisme et la vie en combat
offbeat.summary: Jean-Marc Sylvestre, un journaliste économique français, est décédé à 79 ans après une longue maladie. Il était connu pour sa voix familière dans le journalisme économique français et écrivait pour le site Atlantico depuis près de 15 ans. Il a travaillé à la télévision, notamment sur TF1 et LCI, pendant plus de 18 ans. Sa disparition laisse un vide dans le monde du journalisme économique français.

offbeat.title: EastEnders airs horrific Joel Marshall attack twist in early iPlayer release
offbeat.summary: EastEnders has aired a shocking twist in the storyline of Joel Marshall, as he faces a brutal revenge attack from a group of Albert Square teens. The teens, led by Avani and Amy, invited Joel to their end-of-term party under false pretenses, intending to deliver a message that he's not welcome in the Square. The attack has left Joel's fate in peril. The incident follows concerns from Joel's father Ross and stepmother Vicki about his presence in Walford.

offbeat.title: ‘Terrifying’: Woman says landlord was hiding behind wall of Wexford holiday home
offbeat.summary: A woman and her family were left "terrified" after discovering a landlord hiding behind a wall in a Co Wexford holiday home they had booked through Booking.com. The incident occurred last weekend when Therese and her family returned from a family party to find the landlord behind the wall. Booking.com has launched an investigation into the incident and suspended the property while it is completed. The company is reviewing its policies to ensure such incidents do not happen in the future.

offbeat.title: Casemiro: Inter Miami being investigated for tampering after signing ex-Manchester United midfielder
offbeat.summary: Major League Soccer is investigating Inter Miami for alleged tampering after the club signed Brazilian midfielder Casemiro on a deal through 2027 with an option to extend until 2029. The investigation concerns Casemiro's discovery rights, which Inter Miami acquired from the Los Angeles Galaxy. Casemiro left Manchester United at the end of last season. The league will gather all relevant information before making further comment.

offbeat.title: Polymarket Promo Code "LIVESCORE" Claim $50 Trade Bonus on Orioles at Red Sox
offbeat.summary: A $50 trade bonus is available to new users on Polymarket, a prediction market platform, when they sign up using the promo code LIVESCORE. This offer is available for users in the US, who must be at least 18 years old, and is valid for the MLB season. The bonus is a strong starting point to explore Polymarket's features, which allow users to trade on real-world outcomes. The offer is available for a limited time, as users can start trading on baseball and other markets immediately.

offbeat.title: IFC: First Look at The Stunt Driver
offbeat.summary: Jay Baruchel stars as Ken Carter, a Canadian daredevil stunt driver, in the upcoming comedy film The Stunt Driver, set to open in U.S. theaters on September 25. The movie tells the true underdog story of Carter's attempt to jump a mile across the St. Lawrence river in a rocket car. Ben Foster plays Evel Knievel in the film, which also features Laurence Leboeuf, Dan Bakkedahl, and Ed Helms. The Stunt Driver is a biopic about Carter's life and death, which was marked by a tragic accident in 1983.

offbeat.title: Las Feministas del PSOE y 96 asociaciones de España y Latinoamérica cargan contra Bibiana Aído ante ONU por atacar a la relatora de Mujer
offbeat.summary: Bibiana Aído, director regional de ONU Mujeres para América Latina y el Caribe, is facing criticism from over 96 organizations in Spain and Latin America, including the Spanish Socialist Workers' Party's feminist wing, for allegedly defaming and attacking Reem Alsalem, a UN special rapporteur on violence against women. The organizations accuse Aído of promoting a report that dilutes the distinction between sex and gender, normalizes prostitution, and supports gestation by a third party. Aído is expected to respond to the allegations.

offbeat.title: Courbatures, nausées, vomissements aux Vieilles charrues : des festivaliers malades, la piste des déshydratations en série privilégiée
offbeat.summary: At least 34 festival-goers fell ill during the 34th edition of the Vieilles Charrues festival in France, with symptoms including cramps, vomiting, and dehydration. The festival's organizers believe the cause is likely severe dehydration, not food poisoning. The incident occurred on July 18, 2026, and the festival is still open. The situation is being closely monitored by medical staff on site.

offbeat.title: Isabel Rose: British woman jailed for blackmail after accusing banker of rape in Hong Kong
offbeat.summary: A British woman was jailed for six years in Hong Kong on Wednesday after a court found her rape allegation against a banker was fabricated. Isabel Rose, 26, from London, made the false claim in January 2024 while visiting the man, who was arrested but later released without charge. Prosecutors said she sought £100,000 in exchange for dropping the accusation. Rose denied the charges and maintains she was raped, with her legal team reviewing further options.

offbeat.title: Polymarket Promo Code SBWIRE Get $20 Bonus for UFC, PGA, Politics & More (July 22)
offbeat.summary: New users can now access Polymarket's prediction markets with a $20 bonus after a $10 deposit using the promo code SBWIRE. The offer is available to eligible users in 48 states and DC, excluding Nevada and Minnesota. The bonus can be used on various markets, including sports, politics, and more. With the NFL preseason opener on August 6, users can jump in on the action and start trading live markets today.

offbeat.title: Obama Takes Shot at Vance Over Marriage ‘Hypocrisy’
offbeat.summary: Former President Barack Obama criticized Vice President JD Vance for his stance on immigration, pointing out the hypocrisy of Vance's hardline rhetoric given his own marriage to an immigrant. Vance's wife, Usha, received US citizenship at birth after her parents immigrated from India. Obama made the comments on a podcast, suggesting Vance feels guilty about his marriage contradicting his views. The exchange highlights the contrast between the two men's views on American identity.

offbeat.title: Man, 30s, dies after being struck by van in Co Kilkenny
offbeat.summary: A man in his 30s has died after being struck by a van on the R693 near Arigan Bridge in Co Kilkenny at 9:30am. This is the 101st road fatality in Ireland so far this year. The man, a pedestrian, was pronounced dead at the scene and his body was taken to University Hospital Waterford for a post-mortem examination. Gardaí are appealing for witnesses to come forward with any information or camera footage.

offbeat.title: Ryanair Spain flight suffers 'technical issue' and met by emergency services
offbeat.summary: A Ryanair flight from Malaga to Edinburgh, FR5090, declared a mid-air emergency and issued a 7700 squawk code before landing safely at Edinburgh Airport on July 22. The crew reported a minor technical issue, which was inspected by engineers as standard procedure. Passengers disembarked normally. An investigation into the incident is likely to follow.

offbeat.title: Coritiba x Palmeiras: onde assistir ao vivo, horário e escalações
offbeat.summary: Coritiba and Palmeiras are set to face off in the Brasileirão at the Couto Pereira stadium on July 22, with Palmeiras holding a 15-point lead over Coritiba in the standings. Palmeiras has 41 points in 18 games, while Coritiba has 26 points in 18 games. The match is scheduled to start at 7:30 PM local time, and will be broadcast live on Amazon Prime. Palmeiras will be without coach Abel Ferreira, who is serving a suspension.

offbeat.title: Barcelona market value update: Lamine remains at the top at €220m; Cubarsi breaks €100m barrier
offbeat.summary: Barcelona's Lamine Yamal remains the world's most valuable footballer, tied with Erling Haaland, with a market value of €220 million following Spain's successful 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign. Pau Cubarsi, a 19-year-old Barcelona defender, has broken the €100 million barrier, reaching a valuation of €100 million after being named the tournament's Best Young Player. This update comes from Transfermarkt. The market values of several Barcelona players have increased after impressive World Cup performances.

offbeat.title: Mid-air mass brawl halts easyJet's Tenerife to Liverpool flight
offbeat.summary: A mid-air brawl involving around 10 passengers on easyJet flight EZY3352 forced the plane to return to Tenerife South airport on Tuesday evening, posing a safety risk to the 186 passengers on board. The captain made the decision to turn back about 30 minutes after departure. Police met the plane upon its return and the flight later continued to Liverpool. The airline is investigating the incident.

offbeat.title: "Bad Times at the El Royale" bei Pro7 im Livestream und TV: TV-Tipp bei Pro7 - Film von Drew Goddard am 23.07.2026
offbeat.summary: The film "Bad Times at the El Royale" by Drew Goddard will be shown on Pro7 on July 23, 2026, at 00:10 UTC, with a 155-minute runtime. The movie, a mystery thriller released in 2018, follows the intersecting paths of seven mysterious individuals at the down-at-heel Hotel El Royale. Pro7 will also offer a live stream of the film online.
offbeat.trend: bad times at the el royale

offbeat.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
offbeat.summary: Tesla reported weaker-than-expected earnings for the second quarter, with adjusted earnings per share of 33 cents, missing the 51 cents expected by analysts. Revenue topped estimates at $28.24 billion, a 26% increase from the same period last year. The company's net income fell 5% to $1.11 billion. Tesla's stock price slid about 4% in extended trading, continuing a decline that has seen the stock drop 17% this year.

offbeat.title: Shownieuws creëert verwarring over lot Greetje in Urk!: 'Doet echt niet meer mee'
offbeat.summary: Reality TV star Greetje Hakvoort's participation in the show Urk is in question, with conflicting statements from the show's presenters. Shownieuws host Fien Vermeulen claims Greetje will no longer appear in the series, while earlier in the show, host Teun Kapitein said she is still part of the cast. The show's producers have stated that Greetje's departure is not confirmed. The situation remains unclear, with Greetje's future in the show uncertain.

offbeat.title: Arokodare forces Wolves training to be cancelled
offbeat.summary: Wolverhampton Wanderers cancelled a training session after striker Tolu Arokodare refused to leave the pitch, demanding a transfer to Fiorentina despite the club rejecting a bid from the Serie A side. Arokodare, 25, was not involved in Wednesday's friendly at Maidenhead United. The latest incident is the second flashpoint in the forward's career at Molineux, following a disciplinary action in April. The club's new head coach, Cesar Peixoto, terminated the training session on Monday.

offbeat.title: Juve-Vlahovic: prove di rinnovo, ma c'è molta distanza. E Carnevali non molla Kolo Muani
offbeat.summary: Juventus and Dusan Vlahovic have begun negotiations on a contract renewal, with the club offering a maximum of 6 million euros in salary and commissions, while Vlahovic is seeking 7 million euros annually and 9 million euros for signing. The two parties are still far apart, but this gap may serve as a starting point for a compromise. The club is also pursuing Kolo Muani, but Paris Saint-Germain has already rejected three offers from Juventus, valuing the player at 50 million euros.

offbeat.title: Has Trump dragged the US into a forever war in Iran? | Mohamad Bazzi
offbeat.summary: A US-Iran ceasefire negotiated by President Trump has collapsed, marking nearly five months since the start of a war in Iran. The conflict has continued despite Trump's initial promise of a decisive victory within weeks. The US is now at risk of being drawn into a prolonged conflict, contradicting Trump's 2024 election pledge to stop wars. The situation remains uncertain as the US and Iran re-evaluate their next steps.

offbeat.title: July 23, 2026: Alcala Gurri vs Dietrich Tennis Prediction Market
offbeat.summary: Professional tennis player M. Alcala Gurri is favored to win the July 23, 2026, match against D. Dietrich, with odds of 47 cents to Dietrich's 55 cents. The match is part of the 2026 ATP Challenger Zug Round Of 16. Gurri's chances of winning have been bet on by 141 people, while 992 have bet on Dietrich. The outcome of the match will determine the resolution of the prediction market contract.

offbeat.title: Not Greek to them. Scholars question Christopher Nolan’s ‘The Odyssey’
offbeat.summary: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" has grossed over $260 million worldwide in its opening weekend, but scholars like Greek translator Emily Wilson question the film's ability to capture the essence of Homer's epic poem. Wilson's own translation of "The Odyssey" has seen a surge in popularity, reaching the top 5 on Amazon.com. Critics have praised the film's acting and narrative drive. The movie's success has brought renewed attention to the ancient poem.

offbeat.title: Zecken breiten sich im Nordwesten aus – so schützen Sie sich
offbeat.summary: Zecken infestation is spreading in the northwest of Germany, particularly in Niedersachsen, where cases of tick-borne Frühsommer-Meningoenzephalitis, or FSME, have been increasing. According to health officials, the virus can now be found in ticks across all of Germany, with new risk areas identified in Nordrhein-Westfalen and Sachsen-Anhalt. In Niedersachsen, the Ems region is particularly at risk, with tick encounters common in everyday life, not just during outdoor activities. Health authorities are urging residents to take precautions to protect themselves.

offbeat.title: How Troy Jackson went from an anti-abortion Republican to the Democrats’ hope for defeating Susan Collins
offbeat.summary: Troy Jackson is poised to become the Democratic nominee for Senate in Maine, potentially challenging Susan Collins. Jackson, a former Maine Senate Democratic leader with over two decades of state politics experience, has gained support from former Graham Platner supporters. He now faces a primary election. Jackson's campaign is seen as a more stable alternative after Platner's campaign imploded amid a rape allegation.

offbeat.title: Conservatives Parrot A Victimhood Script Written By Barack Obama
offbeat.summary: Former US President Donald Trump won the 2024 presidential election, despite concerns that social media platforms like TikTok may be fueling opposition to the war in Iran. According to reports, Trump's campaign benefited from the platform, which has been criticized for promoting socialism. The election took place on a specific date, but that information is not available in the provided excerpts. The outcome of the election has significant implications for US foreign policy and domestic politics.

offbeat.title: Alphabet earnings updates: Stock sinks during analyst call as company hikes 2026 capex
offbeat.summary: Google's stock sank during an analyst call as the company increased its 2026 capital expenditure forecast to as much as $205 billion. Alphabet's CEO Sundar Pichai emphasized scaling the business and executing on its potential, particularly with its Waymo autonomous taxi service. The company is also investing heavily in its Gemini 4 AI model, with plans to release new models almost every month. Google's increased spending is expected to fuel growth in its various sectors.

offbeat.title: Die Exporte nach Singapur verzeichnen weiterhin ein starkes Wachstum.
offbeat.summary: Vietnam’s exports to Singapore surged 48.9 percent in June 2026, reaching 85.4 billion SGD as bilateral trade hit 27.9 billion SGD, up 43.1 percent year-on-year. Singapore’s total trade volume with the world jumped 49.3 percent to 158.1 billion SGD in June alone. For the first half of 2026, Singapore’s trade totaled 887 billion SGD, a 33 percent increase over the same period in 2025. Vietnam remains Singapore’s 10th largest trading partner.

offbeat.title: Hart van Nederland nu kijken of gemist?
offbeat.summary: A Dutch news program, Hart van Nederland, airs on SBS 6 at 01:55 on July 25, covering the latest news from the Netherlands and abroad. The program provides a unique perspective on the day's top stories in 10 minutes. Viewers can also catch up on previous episodes on the SBS 6 website.

offbeat.title: A year after deadly jet crash at Bangladesh school, families demand answers
offbeat.summary: A year after a Bangladeshi air force jet crashed into Milestone School and College in Dhaka, killing 36 people—mostly children—families and survivors marked the anniversary demanding answers. More than 160 were injured in the deadliest aviation disaster in decades. Survivors like sixth-grader Nure Jannat Yusha describe ongoing trauma, with many unable to return to normal life. Investigations into the cause continue as the school community gathers to remember the victims.

offbeat.title: Blocked by censors, China's animal lovers take fight against abuse offline and overseas
offbeat.summary: Animal welfare activists in China are taking their fight against animal cruelty overseas after graphic videos of a stray dog and her puppies being killed sparked outrage in June. Authorities cited the four boys involved, all under 14, as they urged online silence and removed posts, but the restrictions fueled further protests. Supporters have now placed billboards in New York to rally international attention. Three weeks later, social media posts about the incident continue to draw thousands of comments in China.

offbeat.title: Diamante: il secondo falò - Temptation Island Clip | Witty TV
offbeat.summary: A fire broke out at the Diamante nightclub in Italy, causing significant damage. The incident occurred on June 23, 2026, during a live event. The cause of the fire is not specified, but it is reported to have been extinguished. The nightclub was hosting a live event at the time of the fire, and the extent of the damage is not yet clear.

offbeat.title: World Cup 2026: Gavi does not think Paredes should be suspended
offbeat.summary: Spain midfielder Gavi believes Argentina's Leandro Paredes should not be suspended for his role in a confrontation following the World Cup final. Paredes was involved in a physical altercation with Spain's Eric Garcia, but Gavi thinks a match ejection would have been sufficient. The incident is under review by FIFA, which may impose suspensions or fines on players and coaches involved. A disciplinary and ethics prosecutor has been appointed to assess the situation.

offbeat.title: talkSPORT tips – Best football bets and expert advice for Wednesday 22 July
offbeat.summary: Major League Soccer resumes after a two-month break with a packed schedule on Wednesday, featuring eight matches, including New England Revolution hosting Toronto, where the Canadians are winless in nine matches. The Revolution have kept three clean sheets at home this season. New England is expected to come out on top against Toronto. The outcome will be a crucial test for Toronto's struggling team.

offbeat.title: Vincenzo Italiano: "Çok kaliteli bir oyuncu, beni şaşırttı"
offbeat.summary: Beşiktaş Teknik Direktörü Vincenzo Italiano, UEFA Avrupa Ligi'nde Midtjylland ile oynayacakları karşılaşma öncesinde takımın hazır olduğunu belirterek, sahaya Beşiktaş kimliğini yansıtan bir ekip çıkarmayı hedeflediklerini söyledi. Italiano, sezon öncesi kampının milli takımlarda bulunan oyuncular nedeniyle eksik kadroyla başladığını ifade etti. Beşiktaş, Midtjylland ile oynayacakları maçta tam kadro ile çıkacak. Italiano, Avrupa kupalarının farklı bir heyecan taşıdığını ve takımın yolumuza devam etmek istediklerini belirtti.

offbeat.title: Student Police Academy helps inspire the next generation
offbeat.summary: Twenty-four students from local schools graduated from the 2026 Delta Police Student Police Academy, marking the conclusion of another successful year. The Academy provided students with hands-on experience in policing, including the Police Officer Physical Abilities Test and high ropes course. Students learned about the various aspects of modern policing, such as investigations and community engagement. The graduates now have a better understanding of the career and its demands, potentially inspiring the next generation of police officers.

offbeat.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
offbeat.summary: The US and Saudi Arabia signed a landmark nuclear deal on Wednesday, allowing Saudi Arabia to enrich uranium on its soil at a US-built facility. The agreement aims to enhance regional security and strengthen US leadership in civil nuclear technology. US Energy Secretary Chris Wright emphasized the deal’s adherence to high nuclear safety and nonproliferation standards. Experts will monitor compliance to prevent weapons-grade uranium production.

offbeat.title: Ao vivo: Coritiba x Palmeiras | Rodada 19 | Campeonato Brasileiro
offbeat.summary: Palmeiras defeated Coritiba 2-0 in the 19th round of the Campeonato Brasileiro. The match took place on a specific date, with Palmeiras scoring two goals. Coritiba was unable to score, resulting in a shutout. Palmeiras' win moves them forward in the standings.

breaking.title: Indian police cracked down on 'cockroach' protesters. They went home and made memes about it
breaking.summary: On Monday, tens of thousands of protesters from the youth-led Cockroach Janta Party marched toward India’s parliament in Delhi, demanding Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan’s resignation over exam leaks and recruitment scandals. Police responded with tear gas and baton charges, but protesters dispersed and later mocked the crackdown online with memes. Pradhan has refused to step down, blaming opposition parties for politicizing the issue. The movement, which began over exam irregularities, has expanded into broader calls for government accountability.

breaking.title: Trump threatens to target Iran's bridges and power plants if Hormuz attacks persist
breaking.summary: President Donald Trump threatened to strike Iranian bridges or power plants, including near Tehran, if attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz continue. The warning follows 11 consecutive US strikes on Iran, with explosions reported in multiple cities, including near the Bushehr nuclear plant. Iran has vowed reprisals after Trump said the US would target an underground nuclear site near Natanz. Kuwait, Bahrain, and Jordan reported intercepting Iranian drones in recent days.

breaking.title: Why Are Young People in India Protesting?
breaking.summary: A youth-led movement angry over the education system and a lack of jobs is posing a rare challenge to a government that has ruled for more than a decade with a firm hand.

tech.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
tech.summary: Google parent Alphabet reported negative free cash flow of $5.9 billion in its latest quarter, the first time in over a decade, as AI infrastructure costs surged to $45 billion. Revenue grew 23% year-over-year to $119.8 billion, but stock fell 4% after hours. AI spending is projected to reach $205 billion this year, with 60% of costs covering servers and 40% for data centers. Analysts expect continued heavy investment as the AI race intensifies.

tech.title: Meta won’t have to face the next planned social media addiction trial
tech.summary: A Florida teen dropped a lawsuit against Meta just days before trial, withdrawing claims that the company’s features harmed teens. The case, part of a broader set of bellwether trials, was set to test whether social media platforms designed addictive features. TikTok, Snap, and YouTube previously settled similar claims by the same plaintiff for undisclosed amounts. Meta avoided trial and will continue defending against similar lawsuits.

tech.title: Alphabet Quadruples Profit to $112 Billion, Fueled by A.I. Investments
tech.summary: Google’s parent company, which has spent heavily on artificial intelligence, also showed growth across its businesses, particularly in cloud computing.

entertainment.title: Shaken, Soaked and Seasick: What It’s Like to Survive ‘The Odyssey’ in 4DX
entertainment.summary: Christopher Nolan’s three-hour epic The Odyssey, starring Matt Damon, now offers a 4DX experience with seat rumbling and water effects. The immersive format premiered in select theaters on October 11, adding physical motion to the film’s visual spectacle. Audiences report a heightened sensory experience compared to standard screenings. The 4DX rollout expands Nolan’s film’s accessibility beyond traditional IMAX and 70mm formats.

entertainment.title: ‘Doctor Strange’ Director Says Elon Musk ‘Doesn’t Know S— About Cinema’ After Musk Vows to Make AI ‘Odyssey’: ‘His Opinions on Art Are Worthless’
entertainment.summary: Film director Scott Derrickson criticized Elon Musk on July 22, 2026, calling his views on cinema worthless after Musk claimed his AI tool Grok would produce a full-length movie of The Odyssey by year’s end. Musk shared an AI-generated clip from the project, but Derrickson dismissed his filmmaking knowledge, saying Musk stopped reading in his 20s. Musk has previously attacked Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey over casting choices. Industry observers now await the AI-generated film’s release.

entertainment.title: ‘Star Trek: Strange New Worlds’ Cast, Co-Showrunner Talk Playing With Genres in Season 4, ‘Joyful Curiosity,’ and That Puppet Episode
entertainment.summary: Season 4 of Star Trek: Strange New Worlds will explore multiple genres, blending classic sci-fi thrills with fresh storytelling approaches. Cast members Anson Mount, Celia Rose Gooding, Melissa Navia, and Carol Kane joined co-showrunner Akiva Goldsman at 92NY in New York to preview the Paramount+ series’ upcoming season. Goldsman highlighted episodes that push boundaries, following the show’s trend of genre experimentation. The season premieres after a sneak peek at the new episodes.

sports.title: Tears and sleepless nights as Marshall and Adlington get Scotland flag honour
sports.summary: Scotland will honour Commonwealth Games flagbearers Marshall and Adlington ahead of Thursday’s opening ceremony. Marshall, 59, a bowls competitor from East Lothian, will carry the flag alongside his niece Beth Riva, while judoka Adlington, 39, aims to complete a career treble. Both learned of the honour weeks ago but kept it secret until now. The pair will share the flag during the parade before it returns for the competition start.

sports.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
sports.summary: Liverpool are closing in on a deal for Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, 23, after his standout World Cup performances for France. The Reds lead the race over Arsenal and Bayern Munich for the winger, who has four goal contributions this summer. Meanwhile, Manchester United’s Bruno Fernandes, 31, has agreed to extend his stay. Arsenal are also weighing options for captain Martin Odegaard, 27.

sports.title: Joshua not ready for death of friends to 'sink in'
sports.summary: Anthony Joshua says he’s still not ready to process the deaths of two close friends and team members in a December 29 crash near Lagos. The boxer, who suffered minor injuries, returns to the ring Saturday against Kristian Prenga in his first fight since knocking out Jake Paul. Joshua called the loss “tough,” telling BBC Sport the pain lingers even when talking about it. The bout marks his first competitive match since the fatal accident.

politics.title: Trump’s Plan for Science: More Money for A.I., Less for Universities
politics.summary: Michael Kratsios, President Trump’s science adviser, proposed overhauling how the government funds research. Democrats said Mr. Trump’s actions had weakened science.

politics.title: House Passes Defense Bill Amid Iran War Divide
politics.summary: Republicans pushed through the $1.15 trillion bill over opposition from Democrats, who said backing it was akin to embracing the war.

crisis.title: Three Airports Plan to Ditch T.S.A. Amid Push for Private Security
crisis.summary: The airports have opted in to the agency’s new security model, an agency spokesperson confirmed on Wednesday. A union official said the move could jeopardize public safety.

crisis.title: Donald Trump Jr.’s Investment Firm Posts Staggering Returns of 200%
crisis.summary: The fledgling firm, run by the president’s oldest son and his partner Omeed Malik, has made investments in A.I. and defense technology that have tripled in value in just months.

facts.title: NASA to Showcase Agency’s Newest Wind Tunnel in Virginia
facts.summary: NASA will unveil its first new wind tunnel in over 40 years at Langley Research Center in Hampton, Virginia, on July 31. The Flight Dynamics Research Facility will be showcased during a ribbon-cutting ceremony and media tour featuring NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman and other officials. The event is open only to U.S. media citizens or permanent residents, who must RSVP by July 29. This marks a key step in NASA’s ongoing aerospace research capabilities.

facts.title: What Were the Lotus-Eaters Eating in Homer’s ‘Odyssey’?
facts.summary: In Homer’s epic, Odysseus’s men eat something so powerful that they forget about home. Which plants could have produced such a soporific, narcotic and amnesiac effect?

health.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
health.summary: A British health select committee report finds that obesity is an engineered outcome, not a failure of willpower. The report targets ultra-processed foods, citing sugar and refined carbohydrates as primary drivers of weight gain and type 2 diabetes. The committee recommends a new approach to food policy, shifting focus from the "high in fat, salt or sugar" framework to a more targeted strategy. This change aims to hold supermarkets and manufacturers accountable for healthier food options.

health.title: Government Overhauls Teen Pregnancy Program to Focus on Marriage and Starting Families
health.summary: The administration canceled federal grants to organizations across the country, accusing them of encouraging premarital sex. New criteria say programs should stress abstinence.
